text: Onboard safety familiarization for any newly joining seafarer must be conducted within:

options.text: The first month of the voyage

explanation: Safety familiarization is critical for ensuring that any crew member joining the ship can safely respond to emergencies. Per STCW and SOLAS regulations, this instruction must be provided to every seafarer before they are assigned any shipboard duties, which is legally defined as within 24 hours of joining.
